name: The Lady Commander
overview: Lin Yue'er, daughter of a defeated general, disguises herself as a singsong girl named Ting Wu to investigate her father's defeat. Amidst dangers from Guo Shucheng, Guo Feng, Zhao Dinghong, and Sui Ruoan, she uses her wits to uncover the truth and seek justice for the thousands of loyal soldiers of the Lin family army.

trailers.title: Trailer: Revenge girl was caught into a complicated love triangle | ENG SUB | The Flower of No Man
